morning: Good morning, {name}. Waking up knowing you're mine is still my favourite part of every day. ❤️
Good morning my love. I hope your day is as beautiful as the smile you gave me the first time we met. 🌅
Rise and shine, {name}. The sun is up, but you're still the brightest thing in my world. ☀️
Good morning sweetheart. Before you check anything else on your phone, know this: I love you, today and always. 💕
Morning, my queen. Whatever today throws at you, remember you have a man who adores you completely. 👑
Good morning {name}. I thanked God for you again this morning — He really showed off when He made you. 🙏❤️
Hey beautiful, good morning. Just wanted my voice to be one of the first things in your heart today. 😊
Good morning, my heart. Distance between our pillows or not, you're the first thing on my mind. 💭💖
Wake up, gorgeous! The world gets to enjoy you today, but I'm the lucky one who gets to love you. 🌍💘
Good morning {name}. Marrying you remains the smartest thing I've ever done. Have an amazing day. 💍
Sunrise reminder: you are loved, you are cherished, and you are stuck with me forever. Good morning! 😄❤️
Good morning, my sunshine. May your coffee be strong and your day be soft. I love you. ☕💛
Every morning with you in my life is a good morning. Go and shine today, {name}. ✨
Good morning baby. I can't wait to see you later — until then, carry my love with you everywhere. 🥰
Morning, {name}. Just a reminder that of all the hearts in the world, yours is the one I'd choose every single time. 💝
night: Good night, {name}. Sleep well knowing you are deeply, completely loved. ❤️🌙
Good night my love. Today was better because you were in it — like every day since I met you. 😘
Sweet dreams, {name}. I hope you dream of us, because you're always in mine. 💤💕
Good night, my queen. Rest that beautiful mind of yours. Tomorrow I'll love you even more than today. 👑🌙
As you close your eyes tonight, remember: you are my answered prayer. Good night, sweetheart. 🙏💖
Good night {name}. The stars are out, but they've got nothing on you. Sleep tight. ✨
Nights end our days, but nothing ends my love for you. Sleep well, my darling. 🌌❤️
Good night baby. Thank you for being my peace in this crazy world. Rest well. 🕊️💛
Sleep well, {name}. I fall for you all over again every single day — see you in my dreams. 😴💘
Good night, my heart. Whatever happened today, tomorrow is ours. I love you endlessly. 🌙
Before you sleep, one last thing: I am so proud to call you mine. Good night, beautiful. 💝
Good night {name}. My last thought tonight is you — same as every night. Sweet dreams, my love. 💭❤️
Rest well tonight, my darling. You work so hard and love so well. You deserve the sweetest sleep. 🥰🌙
Good night, {name}. If I could, I'd tuck the whole sky in around you. Sleep tight, my love. 🌠
The day is done, and my heart is full — because of you. Good night, my forever. ❤️♾️
